combination_method: unweighted average of official LHMP scenario categories

records.source_plan: City of Oakland 2021-2026 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
records.source_chapter: Appendix E, Detailed Risk Ranking Results
records.methodology_notes: Official adopted LHMP appendix risk-ranking scenario category by sub-area. StayReady combines multiple scenario categories with an unweighted category average when more than one scenario is available for the same hazard and plan area.
records.limitations: Official scenario category supports area-level hazard planning context and is not an exact personal probability or property-damage prediction.

records.methodology_notes: Official adopted LHMP appendix risk-ranking scenario category by sub-area. StayReady combines multiple scenario categories with an unweighted category average when more than one scenario is available for the same hazard and plan area.
records.limitations: Official scenario category supports area-level hazard planning context and is not an exact personal probability or property-damage prediction.
